nodes.name: Rhipidura
nodes.summary: Rhipidura（Rhipidura）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联59种鸟类，如Black fantail、Black-and-cinnamon fantail、Mindanao blue fantail等59种鸟类。

nodes.name: Taliabu fantail
nodes.summary: The Taliabu fantail (Rhipidura sulaensis) is a species of bird in the family Rhipiduridae. It is endemic to Taliabu in Indonesia. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. It was considered conspecific with the rusty-bellied fantail. References
nodes.shortSummary: The Taliabu fantail (Rhipidura sulaensis) is a species of bird in the family Rhipiduridae. It is endemic to Taliabu in Indonesia.
